case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. BALLANTYNE, HOPE M

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALLANTYNE, HOPE M $7,554.42 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,554.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BALLANTYNE, HOPE M NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BALLANTYNE, HOPE M

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED JUL-27-2011, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BALLANTYNE, HOPE M PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON SEP-01-2011 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
